mapper.select: SELECT p.project_id, p.project_code, p.project_name, p.project_type, p.procurement_mode, p.owner_org_id, owner_department.department_name AS owner_org_name, p.agent_org_id, agent_department.department_name AS agent_org_name, p.manager_employee_id, manager_employee.actual_name AS manager_employee_name, p.status, p.budget_amount, p.publish_time, p.archive_time, p.remark, p.version, p.create_time, p.update_time, IFNULL(lot_summary.lot_count, 0) AS lot_count FROM t_bid_project p LEFT JOIN t_department owner_department ON owner_department.department_id = p.owner_org_id LEFT JOIN t_department agent_department ON agent_department.department_id = p.agent_org_id LEFT JOIN t_employee manager_employee ON manager_employee.employee_id = p.manager_employee_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_id, COUNT(1) AS lot_count FROM t_bid_lot WHERE deleted_flag = 0 GROUP BY project_id ) lot_summary ON lot_summary.project_id = p.project_id WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_bid_lot WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted_flag = 0 AND status != 'VOIDED'
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_bid_project
project_code = #{projectCode}, project_name = #{projectName}, project_type = #{projectType}, procurement_mode = #{procurementMode}, owner_org_id = #{ownerOrgId}, agent_org_id = #{agentOrgId}, manager_employee_id = #{managerEmployeeId}, status = #{status}, budget_amount = #{budgetAmount}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, archive_time = #{archiveTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, version = version + 1
WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_flag = 0
